sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for SNES port

special_mechanics.name: Line Jump System
special_mechanics.description: Players can jump between foreground and background lines during combat. Pressing Light Punch or Light Kick while opponent is on opposite line performs a Low Line Jump Attack.

special_mechanics.name: Combo System
special_mechanics.description: Fatal Fury Special introduced a new combo system. When an attack lands, the player gains a brief moment of invincibility to chain attacks together.

feel_descriptors: faster game speed than Fatal Fury 2
tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/Qualitative data only. Sources document gameplay mechanics (combos, line jumping, invincibility windows) and design changes (faster speed) but contain no specific physics values for movement, gravity, or jump parameters. SNES port developed by Monolith Corp. based on arcade original by SNK.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Fatal Fury Special (SNES)
